description: Structured feature catalog for AI agent context. Describes each feature module, its business logic, API surface, UI components, utilities, dependencies, and usage locations.

features.name: cart
features.description: Cookie-based shopping cart for B2C and B2B with quantity management. No database storage - uses httpOnly cookies with 30-day TTL.
businessLogic: Separate cookie stores: 'krmk-kosik' (B2C) and 'krmk-kosik-b2b' (B2B)
Quantity limits: min 1, max 999 per product
Data format: array of { productId, qty } tuples validated via Zod
Invalid/unavailable products filtered lazily during query, not removed from cookie
B2B cart applies tier pricing via getEffectivePrices()

actions.name: addToCart
actions.description: Add/increment item in B2C cart, caps at 999

actions.name: removeFromCart
actions.description: Remove single item from B2C cart

queries.name: getDetailedCart
queries.description: Cart with product data, filters unavailable items, applies optional tier pricing

queries.name: getDetailedB2bCart
queries.description: B2B cart with mandatory tier pricing

queries.name: getCartTotals
queries.description: Computes total cents and quantity from cart items

components: CartDrawer - Slide-in drawer with analytics tracking
CartBadge - Item count indicator in header

features.name: checkout
features.description: Orchestrates order creation: collects customer info, validates pickup details (date/time/store), checks inventory, and delegates to orders feature for persistence.
businessLogic: Daily cutoff at 12:00 - before = can order for tomorrow, after = day after tomorrow
Max 30 days ahead for pickup scheduling
Respects store regular hours + date-specific exceptions (closures/holidays)
Category restrictions can limit pickup dates (e.g., special items only certain days)
Multi-store logic with geolocation-based distance sorting
Time slots generated in 30-minute intervals within store hours
Last order prefill: guest cookie for anonymous, DB lookup for authenticated users
Phone validation: SK/CZ formats (+421/+420 or 0XXXXXXXXX)

actions.name: getLastOrderPrefillAction
actions.description: Fetch customer info + store from most recent order

actions.name: getLastOrderWithItemsAction
actions.description: Full last order with items for repeat order

actions.name: setLastOrderIdAction
actions.description: Save order ID to guest cookie after checkout

queries.name: getLastOrderPrefill
queries.description: Retrieves prefill data from DB (user) or cookie (guest)

queries.name: getLastOrderWithItems
queries.description: Previous order items with current availability/prices

schemas.name: phoneSchema
schemas.validates: International or local phone format, max 16 chars

schemas.name: userInfoSchema
schemas.validates: { name, email, phone } with length limits

utilities: isStoreClosed(date, schedule) - Check regular hours + exceptions
hooks: useCheckoutForm() - Form state, date/time/store coordination, submission
useCheckoutValidation() - Validates customer info from user or prefill
usePickupRestrictions() - Computes allowed dates from cart categories
useB2bCheckoutForm() - B2B variant of form hook
components: CheckoutList / CheckoutListItem - Cart display with totals

features.name: orders
features.description: Order lifecycle management: creation via CTE-based atomic insert, status transitions, payment tracking, pickup modifications, cancellation, and email notifications.
businessLogic: CTE-based atomic insert (order + items + status event in single SQL) - no transactions needed
Auto-retry on order number collision (OBJ-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXXXXXX format)
Status flow: new -> in_progress -> ready_for_pickup -> completed | cancel/refund from new/in_progress
Payment auto-update: completed -> paid, refunded -> refunded
User can modify only new/in_progress orders they own
Admin/staff can modify new/in_progress/ready_for_pickup orders
Price snapshot: product details frozen in orderItems.productSnapshot (JSONB) at creation
Emails sent asynchronously via Next.js after() API
Bulk status updates with chunked email sending

actions.name: updateOrderStatusAction
actions.description: Admin: update status + auto-correct payment status

actions.name: bulkUpdateOrdersAction
actions.description: Admin: batch status updates with chunked emails

actions.name: cancelOrderAction
actions.description: User: cancel own order (checks ownership + status)

actions.name: createB2COrder
actions.description: Full B2C order pipeline: validate -> build items -> persist -> clear cart -> notify

internalHelpers: buildOrderItems - Fetches products, applies tier pricing, returns OrderItemData[]
validateCart / validateB2bCart - Ensures cart not empty
persistOrder - CTE insert with collision retry
notifyOrderCreated - Sends new order + receipt emails
components: OrderStatusTimeline - Visual timeline of status events
CancelOrderDialog - User cancellation modal with reason

features.name: products
features.description: Product catalog management: CRUD, status workflow, B2C/B2B visibility filtering, tier pricing overlay, and cache invalidation.
businessLogic: Status workflow: draft (hidden) -> active (visible) -> sold/archived (hidden)
Visibility flags: showInB2c / showInB2b for catalog filtering
B2B tier pricing overlayed via getEffectivePrices()
Slug uniqueness enforced at DB level
Sort: sortOrder asc, then createdAt desc
Public queries cached with 'max' lifetime until invalidation
Admin queries are never cached (always fresh)

actions.name: updateProductAction
actions.description: Admin: update product fields, invalidate cache

actions.name: createDraftProductAction
actions.description: Admin: create empty draft, redirect to editor

queries.name: getProducts
queries.description: Public: active non-archived products with image/category

queries.name: getProductsByCatalog
queries.description: Filter by showInB2c/showInB2b, overlay tier prices

queries.name: getAdminProducts
queries.description: Uncached full product list for admin

schemas.name: productSchema
schemas.validates: Core fields: id, name, slug, description, status, isActive, sortOrder, showInB2c/B2b, priceCents

components: ProductCard - Product display with image, price, add-to-cart
ProductsGrid - Grid of product cards with filtering/sorting
B2bProductsGrid - B2B variant with tier prices

features.name: categories
features.description: Product category management: CRUD, visibility control, featured flagging, menu display, and catalog filtering with pickup date restrictions.
businessLogic: Both isActive + showInMenu must be true for public display
Featured flag for homepage highlight section
Sorted by featured (desc) then sortOrder (asc)
Categories with zero active products excluded from public views
Slug uniqueness enforced
pickupDates (JSONB array) restricts which days products in this category can be picked up
Catalog filtering: B2B/B2C modes show only categories with visible products

actions.name: toggleIsActiveCategoriesAction
actions.description: Admin: batch toggle active on multiple categories

queries.name: getCategories
queries.description: Public: active + showInMenu categories with products

queries.name: getFeaturedCategories
queries.description: Featured active categories with sorted products

components: CategoriesSidebar - Sidebar menu for e-shop filtering
CategoriesChips - Pill buttons for category filtering

features.name: stores
features.description: Physical store location management: CRUD, opening hours with exceptions, images, and contact info. Used in checkout for pickup location selection.
businessLogic: isActive flag controls public visibility
Opening hours stored as StoreSchedule JSON (regularHours + exceptions)
Exceptions override regular hours for specific dates (closures, holidays)
Stores used in checkout for pickup location + time validation
Geolocation-based distance sorting in checkout

actions.name: updateStoreAction
actions.description: Admin: update store fields, validate slug uniqueness

actions.name: toggleIsActiveStoresAction
actions.description: Admin: toggle active on multiple stores

features.name: posts
features.description: Blog system with articles (TipTap rich text), comments with moderation queue, likes with optimistic UI, and tag-based categorization.
businessLogic: Post statuses: draft, published, archived
Comments require admin approval before being visible (moderation queue)
Likes use onConflictDoNothing() for race-condition-safe toggling
Like/comment counts denormalized on posts table for performance
Counts updated with SQL GREATEST() to prevent negative values
Related posts found by shared tags
Tags with zero published posts filtered from public view

actions.name: updatePostAction
actions.description: Admin: update post + tags, validate slug uniqueness

actions.name: publishPostAction
actions.description: Admin: set published status with timestamp

actions.name: togglePostLikeAction
actions.description: Auth user: toggle like with optimistic UI

actions.name: rejectCommentAction
actions.description: Admin: delete comment (decrement count if published)

queries.name: getPublishedPosts
queries.description: Paginated published posts with tag/search filter

queries.name: getPostBySlug
queries.description: Single published post with author, tags

hooks: useLike() - Like state with optimistic UI, auth redirect

features.name: favorites
features.description: User product favorites with toggle and count. Per-user, requires authentication.
businessLogic: Compound primary key: userId + productId
Toggle on/off with single action
Returns empty array for unauthenticated users (no error)

actions.name: isFavorite
actions.description: Auth user: check if product is favorited

queries.name: getFavoriteIds
queries.description: Array of favorited product IDs for current user

queries.name: getFavorites
queries.description: Full product objects for all favorites

components: FavoritesLink - Link to favorites page with count badge

features.name: user-profile
features.description: User profile updates (name, phone) and order history queries for the profile section.

actions.name: updateCurrentUserProfile
actions.description: Auth user: update name/phone from checkout

actions.name: updateProfileAction
actions.description: Auth user: update name/phone from profile page

queries.name: getUserOrders
queries.description: All orders for user with store and items

queries.name: getUserOrderById
queries.description: Single order detail with status events

features.name: contact-form
features.description: Support request form with context capture (page, URL, user agent, PostHog ID). Sends email to staff + confirmation to user. No database storage.

actions.name: submitSupportRequest
actions.description: Anyone: validate data, send staff email (critical), send user confirmation (non-critical)

schemas.name: supportRequestSchema
schemas.validates: { name, email, rootCause, message, sourcePath?, sourceUrl?, userAgent?, posthogId? }

features.name: media-library
features.description: Centralized image management with upload to Vercel Blob, Sharp optimization (resize 1600px, quality 85, mozJPEG), and usage tracking across entities.
businessLogic: Validates MIME: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF. Max 10MB
Converts all to JPG after optimization
Tracks usage: which products/stores/categories/posts use each image

actions.name: uploadMedia
actions.description: Admin: upload, optimize with Sharp, store in Vercel Blob, save metadata

features.name: buy-again-banner
features.description: Dismissible banner showing user's last order for quick reordering. Appears on homepage, e-shop, and cart drawer. Uses Zustand + sessionStorage.
businessLogic: Fetches most recent order with items via checkout queries
Dismissible via sessionStorage (survives page refresh within session)
Editable quantities in dialog before adding to cart
Shows first 5 products with overflow count badge
Analytics tracking: source (banner, dialog, drawer) and order value
hooks: useBuyAgainOrder(onSuccess?) - Manages repeat order action, analytics, dismissal
features.store: Zustand store with sessionStorage persistence for dismissed state
components: BuyAgainBannerClient - Full banner with customization dialog
LastOrderCard - Collapsible card for cart drawer

features.name: admin-dashboard
features.description: Business intelligence metrics for admin: revenue trends, order stats, top products, operational health. All queries cached with 'minutes' or 'hours' lifetime.
businessLogic: Revenue only counts paid orders
Excludes cancelled orders from all stats
Full date range generation via SQL generate_series (no gaps in charts)
Timezone-safe date handling for Slovakia
Parallel query execution for dashboard metrics

queries.name: getDashboardMetrics
queries.description: All top-card metrics in one call (6 parallel queries)

queries.name: getOrdersByPickupDate
queries.description: Orders for specific date with filters

queries.name: getProductsAggregateByPickupDate
queries.description: Products sold on date, optionally per-store

queries.name: getRevenueHistory
queries.description: Revenue per day for last N days

features.name: b2b/applications
features.description: B2B company registration workflow. Companies submit applications, admins review and approve (creating org + invitation) or reject with reason.
businessLogic: Lifecycle: pending -> approved (creates organization + 7-day invitation) | rejected (with reason)
Race condition protection: WHERE status = 'pending' guard prevents double-approval
Default payment terms: 14 days
Auto-generated slug with uniqueness suffix
Staff notification email on submission

actions.name: submitB2bApplication
actions.description: Customer: submit company registration, send staff notification

actions.name: approveB2bApplication
actions.description: Admin: approve, create org + invitation, assign price tier

queries.name: getB2bApplications
queries.description: Admin: list with optional status/date filters

schemas.name: b2bApplicationSchema
schemas.validates: Company data: companyName, ICO (8 digits), DIČ, IČ DPH, contact info, billing address

features.name: b2b/clients
features.description: Approved B2B organization management. View/edit billing info, tax IDs, price tier assignment, and order statistics.
businessLogic: Order stats: count + total revenue from paid, non-cancelled orders
Partial updates supported (optional fields)
ICO format validated if provided
Price tier existence verified before assignment

actions.name: updateOrganization
actions.description: Admin: update org billing/profile, validate price tier

queries.name: getOrganizations
queries.description: Admin: list with search + order stats aggregation

queries.name: getOrganizationById
queries.description: Admin: detail with members, recent orders, price tier

components: B2BClientDetail - Edit form for org data

features.name: b2b/invoices
features.description: B2B invoice generation and lifecycle. Collects unpaid orders with paymentMethod='invoice' into invoices. Tracks draft -> issued -> paid.
businessLogic: Invoice number format: VS-YYYY-NNNN with auto-increment and collision retry (max 3)
Links unpaid orders with guard WHERE invoiceId IS NULL (race condition safe)
Detects partial claims via expected vs actual updated count comparison
Period-based aggregation (periodStart to periodEnd)
Due date calculated from org's paymentTermDays
Marking paid updates all linked orders to paymentStatus='paid'

actions.name: generateInvoiceForCompany
actions.description: Admin: create invoice from unpaid orders in period

actions.name: issueInvoice
actions.description: Admin: transition draft -> issued, store PDF URL

actions.name: markInvoiceAsPaid
actions.description: Admin: transition issued -> paid, update linked orders

queries.name: getInvoiceById
queries.description: Admin: detail with full order items

features.name: b2b/price-tiers
features.description: B2B pricing tier management. Named collections of per-product price overrides. Organizations are assigned a tier for custom pricing.
businessLogic: Composite PK: (productId, priceTierId) - one price per product per tier
Uses onConflictDoUpdate for upsert semantics
Bulk operations: delete all existing + insert new (not truly atomic due to Neon HTTP)
Prices >= 0 enforced via CHECK constraint
Default product price used if no override in tier

actions.name: bulkSetPricesAction
actions.description: Admin: replace all prices in tier

queries.name: getPriceTiers
queries.description: All tiers sorted by name (cached hours)

queries.name: getPriceTierById
queries.description: Detail with all product prices (cached hours)

features.name: site-config
features.description: Site-wide boolean feature flags stored in siteSettings table. Controls orders_enabled, registration_enabled, promo_banner.
businessLogic: Key-value storage: key is PK, value is boolean
Defaults: orders_enabled=true, registration_enabled=true, promo_banner=false
Only allows keys in ALLOWED_CONFIG_KEYS whitelist
Optimistic UI updates with toast feedback
Layered caching: React cache() + Next.js cacheLife('max') + cacheTag()

actions.name: updateSiteConfig
actions.description: Admin: upsert boolean value for feature flag

queries.name: getSiteConfig
queries.description: Get boolean value for flag, returns default if not in DB

components: SettingsConfigurationsClient - Toggle switches for feature flags

features.name: user-management
features.description: Read-only admin user list and detail views. Shows roles, org memberships, orders, blog activity, and promo usage.

queries.name: getUsers
queries.description: All users with pagination, joins org memberships (cached minutes)

queries.name: getUserById
queries.description: Single user with all relationships (cached minutes)

components: UsersTable - Admin list with TanStack React Table

features.name: hero-banners
features.description: Admin-managed homepage hero banners with image, heading, subtitle, and CTA. Only one banner active at a time with default fallback.
businessLogic: Single-active pattern: activating one banner deactivates all others
Default fallback hero when no banner is active
Images managed via media-library (Vercel Blob)
Cached with cacheLife('hours'), invalidated via 'hero-banners' tag

queries.name: getActiveHeroBanner
queries.description: Active banner with fallback default (cached hours)

queries.name: getHeroBanners
queries.description: All banners ordered by updatedAt desc

schemas.name: heroBannerSchema
schemas.validates: { name (required), heading?, subtitle?, imageId (nullable), ctaLabel?, ctaHref? }

components: HeroBannersList - Card grid with activate/deactivate/delete/edit, image preview, active badge

features.name: store-manager
features.description: Placeholder module for Phase 4 ERP roadmap. Store manager dashboard for per-store order management. Directory exists but not yet implemented.

sharedInfrastructure.name: auth
sharedInfrastructure.description: Better Auth with magic link, Google OAuth, roles (admin/manager/user), B2B organizations. Guards for server actions.
keyExports: getSession() / getUser() / getUserDetails() - Cached session queries (session.ts)
requireAdmin() / requireAuth() / requireStaff() / requireB2bMember() - Authorization guards (guards.ts)
signIn / signUp / useSession / signOut - Client hooks (client.ts)

sharedInfrastructure.name: email
sharedInfrastructure.description: Transactional emails via Nodemailer (SMTP). 14 email types covering orders, auth, B2B, support.

sharedInfrastructure.name: database
sharedInfrastructure.description: Drizzle ORM with Neon HTTP driver. NO transactions supported. 31 tables with prefixed CUID2 IDs.
keyFiles: schema.ts - All table definitions, relationships, constraints, indexes
types.ts - Status enums, type guards, business types (Address, StoreSchedule, ProductSnapshot)
importantTypes: OrderStatus: new | in_progress | ready_for_pickup | completed | cancelled | refunded

sharedInfrastructure.name: pricing
sharedInfrastructure.description: B2B tier price calculation. Returns tier price or falls back to base price.

sharedInfrastructure.name: ids
sharedInfrastructure.description: ID generation with multiple strategies: CUID2 (prefixed), numeric (date-based), order numbers (crypto-random).
keyExports: createPrefixedId(prefix) - Standard DB IDs (prod_, ord_, cat_, sto_)
sharedInfrastructure.usedBy: DB schema defaults, orders, invoices, b2b

sharedInfrastructure.name: analytics
sharedInfrastructure.description: Client-side PostHog event tracking. Object Action naming, snake_case properties, prices in cents.
sharedInfrastructure.usedBy: cart, checkout, products, favorites, search, orders

sharedInfrastructure.name: logger
sharedInfrastructure.description: Pino structured logging with module-scoped loggers. Pretty-printed in dev, JSON in prod.
keyExports: log.orders / log.b2b / log.email / log.cart / log.auth / etc.

sharedInfrastructure.name: errors
sharedInfrastructure.description: Centralized error codes with Slovak user-facing messages. Categories: generic, validation, orders, B2B, DB.
keyExports: ERROR_CODES - Object with all error code strings
getErrorMessage(code) - Translate code to user message

sharedInfrastructure.name: constants
sharedInfrastructure.description: UI labels and configuration: order/payment status labels (Slovak), icons, badge variants.

sharedInfrastructure.name: geo-utils
sharedInfrastructure.description: Store proximity via Haversine formula, distance formatting (Slovak), Apple/Google Maps URL generation.
keyExports: getMapUrl(address, lat?, lon?) - Apple Maps on iOS, Google otherwise

sharedInfrastructure.name: utils
sharedInfrastructure.description: General utilities: Tailwind class merging, price formatting, Slovak pluralization.

sharedInfrastructure.name: pipeline
sharedInfrastructure.description: Result type pattern for multi-step operations. Provides typed success/failure without exceptions.
keyExports: StepResult<T> - { ok: true, data } | { ok: false, error, code }
guard() - Assertion with type narrowing, throws PipelineError

sharedInfrastructure.name: metadata
sharedInfrastructure.description: SEO metadata helpers for Open Graph, Twitter cards, and default site metadata.

sharedInfrastructure.name: seo
sharedInfrastructure.description: Schema.org JSON-LD structured data generators for SEO.

sharedInfrastructure.name: export-utils
sharedInfrastructure.description: Client-side data export to CSV and XLSX formats for admin tables.
keyExports: exportAsCsv(data, columns, filename) - CSV export with timestamp
exportAsXlsx(data, columns, filename) - XLSX export (lazy-loads xlsx library)

sharedInfrastructure.name: consent
sharedInfrastructure.description: Cookie consent management via Consentify with analytics category.

sharedInfrastructure.name: working-time-formatter
sharedInfrastructure.description: Store opening hours formatting for Slovak display.

public.description: Customer-facing pages: shop, checkout, profile, blog, stores, support

admin.description: Admin dashboard: orders, products, categories, stores, blog, B2B, users, settings

b2b.description: B2B partner-facing pages. Currently experimental/test infrastructure with sidebar layout.

api.description: API routes - minimal, auth only. All mutations via server actions.

crossFeatureDependencies.description: Dependency graph between features. Arrow means 'depends on'.

sharedComponents.description: Reusable UI components shared across features. Organized by directory.

ui.description: shadcn/ui base primitives. Standard Radix-based components.

shared.description: Business-level shared components used across features and pages.

cart-and-checkout: add-to-cart-button (use client) - Add to cart with loading, B2C/B2B variants
navigation: mobile-nav (use client) - Left drawer nav with user profile and links
search-and-selection: search-input (use client) - Search box with debounce
pickers: order-store-picker (use client) - Store selector with distance/hours
maps: stores-map (use client) - MapLibre with store markers, user location, routes
media: media-input (use client) - Image upload with drag/drop, preview, delete (Vercel Blob)

forms.description: React Hook Form + Zod field wrappers for form building.
complexForms: b2b-application-form - B2B company registration with nested fields

landing.description: Landing page and homepage section components.

tables.description: TanStack Table column definitions for admin data tables.

sheets.description: Slide-over modal forms for admin CRUD.

filters.description: Shop filtering UI for e-shop catalog.
components: sort-toggles (use client) - Sort and grid/list view toggle

widgets.description: Large composite widgets used across admin and public pages.

data-table.description: Generic TanStack Table system for admin. Server-rendered table with client pagination, search, filters.

editor.description: TipTap rich text editor with simple and full variants.
components: editor (use client) - Rich text editor, props: content, onChange, variant('simple'|'full')

grid-card.description: Responsive card for homepage grid. Supports image carousel, video, color backgrounds.

modules.name: login-modal-store
modules.description: Login modal state with reason tracking (favorites, checkout, default).

modules.name: buy-again-banner/store
modules.description: Buy-again banner dismissed state with sessionStorage persistence.

publicPageComponents.description: Route-level components in src/app/(public)/_components/ used on homepage and public pages.
components: header - Main site header with nav, cart, user button
home-hero - Homepage hero banner (uses hero-banners feature)
brand-story-section - Brand tagline with link to /o-nas
registration-banner - Auth-gated signup promotion for logged-out users
homepage-stores-content - Store locations section with map
homepage-blog-skeleton - Loading skeleton for blog cards
